## Objective

[What is being audited?]

## Scope

[What systems, components, or processes are in scope?]

## Evidence to Collect

- [ ] Runtime inventory
- [ ] Process list
- [ ] Configuration review
- [ ] Log review
- [ ] Database inspection
- [ ] Dependency review

## Restrictions

Observation only. No corrective changes, configuration changes, or modifications.

## Exit Criteria

- [ ] All evidence collected
- [ ] Findings classified by severity
- [ ] Audit summary produced

## Evidence Location

`evidence/phase0/` or appropriate sprint folder
